breakout_products.title: Odyssey-2 Max

breakout_products.title: Someone just killed headless Chrome 🤯 It's called Obscura, an open-source Rust browser built for...
breakout_products.content: Someone just killed headless Chrome 🤯 It's called Obscura, an open-source Rust browser built for AI agents and scraping. Drop-in replacement for Puppeteer & Playwright. → 30MB RAM (vs 200MB+ on Chrome) → 85ms page loads (vs 500ms) → Built-in anti-detection. No more bot walls. → 3,520 trackers blocked by default → Single binary. 100% Open Source.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Obscura: High-performance Rust-based headless browser optimized for AI agents and scraping.
breakout_products.summary: Obscura is an open-source, Rust-based browser designed as a highly efficient, drop-in replacement for Puppeteer and Playwright in AI agent and web scraping workflows.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-source Rust browser Obscura offers a lightweight alternative to headless Chrome for AI agents
key_points: Operates as a single open-source binary that easily replaces existing Puppeteer and Playwright setups.
Significantly reduces resource consumption by using only 30MB of RAM and achieving 85ms page load times.
Features built-in anti-detection mechanisms to bypass bot walls and automatically blocks over 3,500 trackers.

breakout_products.title: Atech
breakout_products.content: Snap-together electronics built from a chat. Hardware is still built with processes that are 10-100 years old. Software got layers of abstraction decades ago while hardware never did. Atech is Lego for real electronics. Snap modules together, describe what you want it to do, and we generate the firmware. Idea to working device in minutes. No datasheet deep-dives, no soldering, no wondering "why doesn't it work?". Product categories: AI Coding Agents, No-Code App Builder.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Innovative use of AI to generate firmware and assemble modular electronics from chat.
breakout_products.summary: This story centers on innovative use of AI to generate firmware and assemble modular electronics from chat.

key_points: Snap-together electronics built from a chat.
Hardware is still built with processes that are 10-100 years old.
Software got layers of abstraction decades ago while hardware never did.

It accurately captures precise structural elements, typography, and color palettes while remaining fully open-source.

breakout_products.title: Someone just built an invisible teleprompter that hides in your MacBook notch. It's called Notchp...

A native macOS app that floats your script right next to the camera so you can read while looking straight into the lens on Zoom calls, demos, or recordings. 100% Open Source.

breakout_products.display_title: Open-source macOS application Notchprompt hides a teleprompter inside the MacBook notch for natural eye contact
key_points: The application floats text right next to the MacBook camera to simulate natural eye contact during presentations.
It cleverly utilizes the physical space of the MacBook notch to create an invisible teleprompter experience.
The tool is completely open-source and designed specifically as a native macOS utility for meetings and demos.

breakout_products.title: 全程无人干预！这支小分队，让智能体在腾讯云黑客松决赛自己答题，赢了6万
breakout_products.content: 智东西 作者 | 陈佳 编辑 | 程茜 智东西4月27日报道，4月25日，第二届腾讯云黑客松智能渗透挑战赛决赛收官，这是国内首个智能体安全攻防赛。和以往真人上手敲代码、挖漏洞的比赛不同，这场比赛的玩法是，参赛队伍需基于国内外的大语言模型开发一个原创AI智能体，全程无人工干预，让AI自动在云端虚拟靶场探测漏洞、闯关渗透、夺取通关Flag。 本次赛事设置四大阶梯解锁赛区，赛题从基础漏洞挖掘到企业内网高阶渗透逐层进阶，赛事方结合通关得分与攻防综合表现划定最终排名。决赛共有10支队伍入围，最终由来自绿盟科技的“ai小分队”拿下总冠军及6万元冠军奖金，天...
breakout_products.selection_reason: Demonstrates autonomous agent capabilities in specialized cybersecurity tasks.
breakout_products.summary: An AI agent developed by NSFOCUS successfully navigated a cloud virtual range to detect vulnerabilities and capture flags without human intervention, winning the championship at the Tencent Cloud Hackathon.
breakout_products.display_title: NSFOCUS Team Wins Tencent Cloud Security Hackathon Using Fully Autonomous AI Agent
key_points: The competition required teams to build large language model-based agents capable of autonomously detecting vulnerabilities and penetrating systems.
The virtual range featured four progressive difficulty tiers, scaling from basic vulnerability mining to advanced enterprise intranet penetration.
The winning squad from NSFOCUS defeated nine other finalists to claim the top prize of 60,000 RMB.

hot_news.title: Microsoft and OpenAI gut their exclusive deal, freeing OpenAI to sell on AWS and Google Cloud
hot_news.content: Microsoft and OpenAI on Monday announced a sweeping overhaul of the partnership that has defined the commercial AI era, dismantling key pillars of exclusivity and revenue-sharing that bound the two companies together for years and replacing them with a looser, time-limited arr...
hot_news.selection_reason: Critical industry news regarding the restructuring of the OpenAI-Microsoft partnership.
hot_news.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI have significantly revised their long-standing partnership, removing exclusivity clauses to allow OpenAI to sell its services on rival cloud networks.
hot_news.display_title: OpenAI and Microsoft restructure their partnership to allow model sales on competing cloud platforms
key_points: The revised agreement dismantles previous exclusivity and revenue-sharing pillars.
OpenAI is now permitted to offer its products on AWS and Google Cloud.
The new arrangement transitions the companies to a looser, time-limited commercial relationship.

hot_news.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
hot_news.content: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. Ahead of OpenAI’s highly anticipated IPO, the court could rule on whether the company is allowed to exist as...
hot_news.selection_reason: Major legal battle between Musk and Altman impacting OpenAI's corporate future.
hot_news.summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are heading to trial in Northern California to resolve a legal dispute that could determine OpenAI's corporate structure ahead of its initial public offering.
hot_news.display_title: A critical trial between Elon Musk and Sam Altman threatens to impact the upcoming OpenAI IPO
key_points: The trial takes place in Northern California following a yearslong legal feud between the two founders.
The court's decision could dictate whether OpenAI is legally permitted to maintain its current corporate structure.
The legal proceedings arrive just before OpenAI's highly anticipated initial public offering.

hot_news.title: Google begins putting the guardrails on agentic AI
hot_news.content: The most important thing Google announced at Google Cloud Next 2026 wasn’t another model, another Tensor Processing Unit (TPU), or another way to sprinkle Gemini across the enterprise (though it did all these things). Rather, it was an admission, or possibly a warning. Agen...
hot_news.selection_reason: Important safety and governance updates for Google's agentic AI systems.
hot_news.summary: At the Google Cloud Next 2026 event, the company emphasized the need for safety measures and warnings regarding the deployment of agentic AI systems.
hot_news.display_title: Google Introduces New Safety Guardrails for Agentic AI at Cloud Next 2026
key_points: Google announced new guardrails for agentic AI alongside hardware and model updates.
The announcement serves as a warning about the risks of autonomous AI agents.
The event also featured new Tensor Processing Units and enterprise Gemini integrations.

llm.title: 📣 What if every open issue had a Codex agent? That’s the idea behind Symphony, an open-source age...
llm.content: 📣 What if every open issue had a Codex agent? That’s the idea behind Symphony, an open-source agent orchestrator for Codex that turns task trackers into always-on systems for agentic work, letting humans focus on review and direction. https://t.co/TxPs0bdtRd
llm.selection_reason: OpenAI launches Symphony, an open-source agent orchestrator for Codex to automate engineering tasks.

key_points: The tool functions as an open-source orchestrator specifically designed for Codex agents.
It transforms standard task trackers into continuous systems for automated agentic work.
The system shifts human involvement away from manual task execution toward review and strategic direction.

llm.title: Google Deep Research Max: Build Autonomous AI Research Agents in Minutes
llm.content: Google just changed how developers do research. On April 21, 2026, they launched Deep Research Max. It runs on Gemini 3.1 Pro and is not just another chatbot upgrade. This is an autonomous AI research agent. It plans, searches, reads, reasons, and writes, all from a single API...
llm.selection_reason: Launch of Google Deep Research Max, an autonomous research agent powered by Gemini.
llm.summary: Powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro, Google's new Deep Research Max is an autonomous AI agent that handles comprehensive research tasks through a single API.
llm.display_title: Google launches Deep Research Max to provide developers with autonomous artificial intelligence research agents
key_points: The system operates on the Gemini 3.1 Pro model rather than functioning as a standard chatbot.
It autonomously manages the entire research workflow, including planning, searching, reading, reasoning, and writing.
Developers can access all of these autonomous research capabilities through a single API endpoint.

llm.title: 小米 MiMo -V2.5 系列模型全部开源 采用宽松的 MIT 协议，允许自由商用、二次训练与微调，无需额外授权。 同时他们还推出了Orbit 100T Token 计划。 这个太牛批了！如果...
llm.content: 小米 MiMo -V2.5 系列模型全部开源 采用宽松的 MIT 协议，允许自由商用、二次训练与微调，无需额外授权。 同时他们还推出了Orbit 100T Token 计划。 这个太牛批了！如果你有自己 Vibe Coding 一些东西可以去领一下。 包含两部分： 分别是面向 AI builder 的『百万亿 Token 创造者激励计划』，与面向 Agent 框架团队的『Agent 生态共建计划』。 百万亿 Token 创造者激励计划： 申请通过的 AI builder 用户最高将获得 Max 档位的 Token Plan，包含 16 亿 Credits ，价值 659 元。 Agent 生态共建计划： 将为你的 agent 框架提供 MiMo token 限免支持，让你的用户免费接入并体验 MiMo 系列模型。
llm.selection_reason: Xiaomi open-sources MiMo-V2.5 models under MIT license with massive token incentive.

llm.display_title: Xiaomi Releases MiMo-V2.5 Open Source Models Alongside Massive Token Incentive Program
key_points: The models are available for free commercial use, secondary training, and fine-tuning without requiring additional authorization.
The Orbit 100T Token plan offers approved AI builders up to 1.6 billion credits, valued at 659 RMB.
An Agent ecosystem initiative provides free token access to help developers integrate MiMo models into their frameworks.

llm.title: 超越DeepSeek-V4！罗福莉交出小米最强开源模型，首日适配5家国产芯片
llm.content: 智东西 作者 | 李水青 编辑 | 云鹏 智东西4月28日报道，刚刚，小米开源罗福莉带队研发的MiMo-V2.5系列模型，采用MIT协议，允许商用推理部署与二次训练，无需额外授权。 ▲MiMo-V2.5-Pro在Hugging Face的开源页面截图 此前，该系列模型于4月23日开启公测，包括MiMo-V2.5-Pro、MiMo-V2.5两款模型。模型具备更强Agent能力，支持100万上下文，且Token效率大幅提升。 MiMo-V2.5-Pro的完整基准测试结果今日公布，小米称其在GDPVal-AA（Elo）、Claw-Eval（pass^3...

Released under the MIT license, the models allow for unrestricted commercial inference deployment and secondary training.
Initial benchmark results claim performance exceeding DeepSeek-V4 across evaluations like GDPVal-AA and Claw-Eval.

image_video.title: StereoFoley: Object-Aware Stereo Audio Generation from Video
image_video.content: We present StereoFoley, a video-to-audio generation framework that produces semantically aligned, temporally synchronized, and spatially accurate stereo sound at 48 kHz. While recent generative video-to-audio models achieve strong semantic and temporal fidelity, they largely r...
image_video.selection_reason: Apple's new StereoFoley framework generates spatially accurate 48kHz stereo audio from video.
image_video.summary: Apple has developed StereoFoley, a new video-to-audio generation framework capable of producing high-fidelity, spatially accurate 48 kHz stereo sound.
image_video.display_title: Apple Introduces StereoFoley Framework for Generating Spatially Accurate Stereo Audio from Video
key_points: The framework generates audio that is semantically aligned and temporally synchronized with video inputs.
It outputs high-quality stereo sound at a 48 kHz sample rate.
Unlike previous models, StereoFoley focuses on spatial accuracy to match object positions in the video.

image_video.title: 简单测试了 PixVerse 出的AI视频生成 CLI 工具 一行命令生成视频，不用开浏览器，直接可以在Claude Code和小龙虾里面利用Agent生成视频 不只是 PixVerse 自己的...

product_updates.title: Amazon Redshift Serverless AI-driven scaling is now the default for new workgroups
product_updates.content: Amazon Redshift Serverless now makes AI-driven scaling and optimization the default for all new workgroups. AI-driven scaling uses machine learning to predict compute needs and automatically adjust resources before queries queue, delivering better price-performance without man...
product_updates.selection_reason: AWS makes AI-driven scaling the default for Redshift, signaling major enterprise AI adoption.
product_updates.summary: Amazon Redshift Serverless now automatically applies AI-driven scaling to all new workgroups to optimize compute resources and improve price-performance.
product_updates.display_title: Amazon Redshift Serverless Enables AI-Driven Resource Scaling by Default for New Workgroups
key_points: Utilizes machine learning to predict compute requirements before query queuing occurs.
Automatically adjusts system resources to prevent performance bottlenecks.
Eliminates the need for manual scaling configuration in newly created workgroups.
